data.title: Market Cautious on U.S.-Iran Peace Agreement Prospects
data.description:
A recent analysis indicates that an account with a success rate exceeding 75% has invested over $480,000 in the position that a permanent peace agreement between the U.S. and Iran will not be reached by April 22. According to Odaily, the opening price for this position was 83.1¢, with the current price at 82.5¢, resulting in an unrealized loss of approximately $3,750.

The U.S. and Iran have been engaged in a second round of negotiations facilitated by Pakistan. However, factors such as port blockades and regional tensions contribute to the high uncertainty of reaching a comprehensive agreement in the short term. The market remains generally cautious in its expectations.

data.title: The Iranian delegation's preliminary working team has reportedly arrived in Islamabad.
data.description: It was learned on April 21 local time that sources in Pakistan's diplomatic circles stated that the preliminary working team of the Iranian delegation had arrived in Islamabad, the capital of Pakistan. Iranian officials have not yet confirmed this. (CCTV)

data.title: An account with a win rate exceeding 75% purchased $480,000 worth of goods; the statement reads, "A permanent peace agreement between the US and Iran will not be reached before April 22."
data.description: Odaily Seer's monitoring shows that accounts with a win rate exceeding 75% have purchased over $480,000 in positions that would not result in a permanent peace agreement between the US and Iran by April 22nd, with an opening price of 83.1¢ and a current price of 82.5¢, resulting in a floating loss of approximately $3,750. Recently, the US and Iran have advanced to the second round of negotiations under Pakistan's mediation, but due to factors such as port blockades and regional tensions, the uncertainty of reaching a comprehensive agreement in the short term remains high, and market expectations are generally cautious. Odaily Seer continues to monitor the prediction market, seeing changes before pricing in prices.

data.title: AI TRENDS | a16z Crypto Highlights Identity as Key Challenge for AI Agents
data.description: a16z crypto has identified identity as the primary challenge for AI agents, rather than intelligence. According to NS3.AI, the firm noted that AI agents already outnumber human employees by approximately 100 to 1 in the financial services sector. To address this, a16z crypto proposed a 'Know Your Agent' model, suggesting that blockchains could facilitate portable identities, programmable wallets, and verifiable attestations across various platforms.

data.title: Crypto Holders Targeted in Violent Home Invasion in France
data.description: A couple in Le Chesnay-Rocquencourt, near Paris, fell victim to a home invasion where attackers impersonating police officers allegedly coerced them into transferring nearly $1 million in Bitcoin. According to NS3.AI, French authorities are currently investigating the incident as an armed robbery and organized criminal conspiracy. This case highlights a growing trend of 'wrench attacks,' where criminals use physical force to target cryptocurrency holders instead of relying on digital hacking methods.

data.title: Binance Cuts Portfolio Margin Collateral Ratios for WBTC, CAKE, ETHFI, INJ, TRUMP Effective April 24
data.description: According to a Binance Announcement, Binance will reduce collateral ratios for five assets under Portfolio Margin effective April 24 at 06:00 UTC, with WBTC cut from 70% to 60%, CAKE and ETHFI each from 60% to 50%, INJ from 60% to 40%, and TRUMP from 50% to 30%. Under PM Pro, TAO's tiered collateral structure will also be revised. Separately, Binance Futures will lower leverage and margin tiers for 19 USDⓈ-M perpetual contracts beginning 06:30 UTC the same day, including ARKMUSDT, BIGTIMEUSDT, BOMEUSDT, and others. Existing positions will be affected; users with active futures grid strategies are advised to adjust before the changes take effect.

data.title: Cobo AI Enhances Agent Control with Structured Permission System
data.description:
On April 21, Cobo AI's Growth Lead, Brad Bao, discussed advancements in agent control at an event titled 'Decoding Web 4.0: When AI Agents Take Over On-Chain Permissions.' According to BlockBeats, Cobo is restructuring the logic of agent fund control through a structured permission system.

In Cobo's products, the relationship between users and agents is defined by an executable 'Policy/Agreement,' rather than a simple wallet authorization. This agreement includes four core elements: Intent, Path, Rules, and Termination. This approach transforms the traditional 'all-or-nothing' permission control into a negotiable, auditable, and revocable fine-grained governance mechanism.

Cobo employs Multi-Party Computation (MPC) technology at the execution level to ensure that even if an agent behaves abnormally, the system is attacked, or prompt injection risks occur, users maintain control over their funds. No single entity can bypass constraints to independently transfer assets. Brad Bao emphasized that within this framework, agents have sufficient freedom to complete complex tasks, but their actions are always confined within verifiable boundaries.

He stated that this system essentially builds a layer of 'trust and insurance infrastructure' in the agent economy. By combining 'contractual permissions and secure computation,' it allows for controlled delegation of agent actions, enhancing automation efficiency while ensuring user asset security and outcome certainty.

data.title: European Stock Markets Open with Declines
data.description: European stock markets opened with widespread declines. According to ChainCatcher, the German DAX index fell by 1.15%, the UK's FTSE 100 index decreased by 0.55%, France's CAC 40 index dropped by 1.12%, the Euro Stoxx 50 index declined by 1.24%, and Italy's FTSE MIB index saw a decrease of 1.36%.

data.title: Bithumb launches Story (IP) flexible staking product
data.description: According to an official announcement, Bithumb is launching the Story (IP) flexible staking product, following its existing 15 assets including ETH, SOL, and TRX. The incentive program will run from April 21st to 27th, with a total prize pool of 200 million Korean Won. IP is the native token of the Story protocol. Story is positioned as an on-chain IP infrastructure for AI, supporting IP registration, programmable licensing, and automated revenue distribution for datasets, models, and AI-generated content.

data.title: Iranian Military Prepared for Decisive Response to Enemy Breaches
data.description: Iranian armed forces commander Abdolrahim Mousavi has stated that Iran is ready to respond decisively to any breaches of commitments by adversaries. According to NS3.AI, Mousavi emphasized the country's preparedness to address any threats or violations, underscoring Iran's commitment to maintaining its national security and sovereignty.

data.title: KelpDAO Explores Measures to Support rsETH Holders Amid Security Incident
data.description: KelpDAO announced on the X platform its commitment to exploring all possible measures to support rsETH holders and mitigate the impact of a recent security incident on the DeFi ecosystem. According to Odaily, the team has collaborated with the Arbitrum Security Council and various ecosystem participants over the past two days to provide background information and assist in evaluation efforts. They also expressed gratitude for the coordination support from teams like SEAL 911. Previously, the Arbitrum Security Council froze approximately 30,700 ETH related to the KelpDAO attacker's assets.

data.title: Cooker reverse-trend ASTEROID: Sold approximately $160,000 at a low price and then bought back at a high price.
data.description: According to crypto analyst Ai (@ai_9684xtpa), trader Cooker has been actively trading ASTEROID recently. Around 10 AM today, he sold approximately $160,000 worth of tokens in the $0.0002714-$0.0003161 range, briefly pushing the price down to $0.0002. He then stated that market FUD (Fear, Uncertainty, and Doubt) was limited and repurchased approximately 1.78 billion ASTEROID tokens in the $0.000359-$0.00048 range.

data.title: South Korea's Tax Agency to Enhance Cryptocurrency Tracking for Tax Evasion Detection
data.description: South Korea's National Tax Service is set to bolster its efforts in analyzing cryptocurrency transaction histories linked to suspected tax evasion. According to NS3.AI, the agency has announced a bid on the Public Procurement Service platform to acquire virtual asset tracking software licenses from Chainalysis and TRM Labs. These tools are expected to assist the agency in identifying the use of mixers and tracing non-custodial wallets, thereby enhancing its capability to detect and address potential tax evasion activities.

data.title: SpaceX's Financial Growth and Control Structure Revealed in IPO Filing
data.description: SpaceX's IPO filing indicates that Elon Musk and a select group of insiders will maintain voting control through a dual-class share structure. According to Jin10, SpaceX's cash reserves have doubled from over $11.4 billion at the end of 2024 to more than $22.8 billion.

data.title: SpaceX XAI Reports Increased Operating Losses in Recent Years
data.description: SpaceX XAI's operating losses have significantly increased over the past few years, according to a prospectus reported by Reuters. The document reveals that the company's losses expanded to $6.4 billion last year, up from $1.56 billion in 2024 and $3.97 billion in 2023. This trend indicates a growing financial challenge for SpaceX XAI as it continues to invest in its operations and development.

data.title: Ukraine's Economic Future to Diversify Beyond Agriculture, Zelensky Says
data.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky emphasized the need for Ukraine's economy to diversify beyond its traditional reliance on agriculture. According to Jin10, Zelensky highlighted the establishment of a robust defense industrial complex as a significant step towards this economic diversification. He underscored the importance of developing various sectors to ensure a more resilient and sustainable economic future for Ukraine.

data.title: ether.fi: LayerZero bridging functionality for weETH and eETH will be restored within 24 hours.
data.description: Ether.fi announced on the X platform that, following guidance from its security partners, it will restore the LayerZero bridging functionality between weETH and eETH within the next 24 hours. Ether.fi had previously confirmed that its Liquid vault was not directly exposed to the risks of the Kelp rsETH incident, but as a precaution, it decided to suspend the LayerZero cross-chain bridging functionality between weETH and eETH until the root cause of the Kelp rsETH incident was clarified. Simultaneously, for Liquid (ETH, BTC, USD), sETHFI, and eBTC products, the relevant Teller contracts have been suspended to block the LayerZero OFT bridging path, and deposit and withdrawal functions for related assets have also been suspended. Ether.fi is currently working closely with its security partners.

data.title: AI Agents Transforming On-Chain Operations with MuleRun's Innovations
data.description:
On April 21, MuleRun's Chief Technology Officer, Shu Junliang, shared insights at an event focused on 'Decoding Web 4.0: When AI Agents Take Over On-Chain Permissions.' According to BlockBeats, Shu emphasized that AI Agents should be viewed as 'personal assistants,' aiming to reduce usage costs and barriers through technological advancements. These agents are structured into modules such as interaction, perception, reasoning, and memory, each supported by different underlying technologies.

Shu highlighted that AI Agents are evolving from traditional text-based interactions on websites or apps to multi-channel communications across platforms like Telegram, Discord, Feishu, DingTalk, and WeChat. This shift aims to provide a seamless interaction experience, significantly lowering user barriers.

MuleRun has proposed an infrastructure solution centered on 'funds permission security' for on-chain scenarios. This includes sandbox isolation, cloud execution, and a fully traceable mechanism to create a trustless operating environment, addressing potential security issues during automatic execution by agents.

In terms of capability evolution, AI Agents will develop self-evolving decision models, continuously learning users' trading strategies and risk preferences to form personalized research and execution systems. Additionally, through a knowledge network mechanism, these agents will enable strategy accumulation and sharing, promoting the reuse and dissemination of on-chain cognition and capabilities.

Shu further noted that as AI Agent capabilities advance, the division of labor in on-chain transactions will be restructured. Agents will gradually take over information processing and execution tasks, allowing humans to focus on higher-level strategy formulation and critical decision-making.

data.title: Bithumb will list CHIP Korean Won.
data.description: According to official announcements, Bithumb will launch CHIP (Korean Won) pairs.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 76,000 USDT with a 2.08% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 21, 2026, 06:35 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 76,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 76,070.796875 USDT, with a narrowed 2.08% increase in 24 hours.
